bio.title: Bio
bio.description: I'm a developer who enjoys the low-level side of programming. Most of my time is spent writing C and C++, and I'm especially passionate about graphics programming and figuring out how to make GPUs render things efficiently. Even though I love being down in the weeds with memory management, sockets, and low-level networking, I'm also pretty comfortable higher up the stack. I build backend APIs and know my way around modern web development (like the SvelteKit site you're looking at right now). Basically, I like knowing exactly how things work under the hood, from the raw network packet all the way up to the browser.

dcuk.description: Built backend api applications using Python and FastAPI

ujep.school: University of Jan Evangelista in Ústí nad Labem
